homepage.title: Home
homepage.description: Experienced, innovative and proactive Front-end Developer with strong expertise in building dynamic, scalable websites and applications. Skilled in delivering elegant and user-focused digital solutions.

about.title: About me
about.label: About
about.description: As a web development professional, I began my career as a web integrator in 2021, mastering technologies such as HTML, CSS, jQuery, and WordPress. In 2023, I transitioned to a frontend developer role, working with React.js and TypeScript. Since then, I have continued to grow as both a frontend developer and web integrator, combining technical precision with creative design to build innovative and visually engaging web experiences.

skills.frontend: Frontend development with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript for building responsive and user-friendly web applications.
skills.html_css: HTML5 and CSS3 for creating semantic, accessible, and visually appealing web pages with responsive design principles.)
skills.git: Version control using Git and GitHub for efficient collaboration, code management, and deployment workflows.
skills.ui_ux: UI/UX design principles to create intuitive and engaging user interfaces that enhance user experience and satisfaction.
